pr.title: Rename grstadium to grpstadium for asserts and clean them up, permuter match a function
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Renamed the Pokemon Stadium ground source from grstadium.c to grpstadium.c so assert file names align with the expected original file string, updated build/split config and includes, then cleaned repeated literal __assert calls into HSD_ASSERT. The PR also made local naming and small statement-order/permuter-driven changes in grpstadium.c, notably around TextWrapper fields and grStadium_801D3138, improving matching while preserving the grStadium_* symbol prefix.
what_changed: Renamed src/melee/gr/grstadium.c to src/melee/gr/grpstadium.c; the removed file header explicitly said the file needed to be named grpstadium.c for asserts.
Updated config/GALE01/splits.txt from melee/gr/grstadium.c to melee/gr/grpstadium.c for the same text/rodata/data/bss/sbss/sdata2 ranges.
Updated configure.py object list from Object(NonMatching, "melee/gr/grstadium.c") to Object(NonMatching, "melee/gr/grpstadium.c").
Updated includes in ftPr_SpecialHi.c, gm_16AE.c, and ground.c from grstadium.h to grpstadium.h.
Changed an OSReport in grStadium_801D10F8 from a hardcoded "grpstadium.c" filename argument to __FILE__, enabled by the source-file rename.
Replaced many manual if-null blocks that called __assert("grpstadium.c", line, expr) with HSD_ASSERT(line, expr), including checks for vision_gobj, gp2, gp2->win_static_p, and gp2->win_dynamic_p.
Renamed TextWrapper fields x18 and x1C to win_static_p and win_dynamic_p and propagated those names through stadium display/text code.
In grStadium_801D3138, reordered local declarations and inserted an empty conditional on jobj->flags, apparently as a matching/permuter tactic.
Renamed some temporary locals in display text code, for example temp_r30/temp_r31 to gp2 where they represented TextWrapper user data.

Bot report showed the rename caused decomp.dev to report many matches under main/melee/gr/grpstadium and corresponding losses under main/melee/gr/grstadium; net matched code improved by +408 bytes (+0.01%).
smart_moves: Renaming the physical source file instead of continuing to hardcode "grpstadium.c" let HSD_ASSERT and __FILE__ produce the desired assert filename naturally.
The split table and configure.py object path were updated with the rename, avoiding build/decomp accounting drift between the source tree and GALE01 split metadata.
The PR kept function symbols as grStadium_* while changing the file/module path to grpstadium, separating symbol naming from original assert-file naming.
Replacing handwritten __assert blocks with HSD_ASSERT reduced clutter while preserving the line numbers required for matching/assert behavior.
Semantic field names win_static_p and win_dynamic_p made HSD_SisLib usage clearer than x18/x1C without changing struct layout.
A tiny permuter-style no-op conditional in grStadium_801D3138 was used narrowly to affect codegen rather than rewriting larger logic.
decomp_lessons: For functions with original assert strings, the C filename can be part of the match surface; use the correct source filename so HSD_ASSERT/__FILE__ expand to the expected string.
File renames in decomp repos must be mirrored in split metadata, build object lists, and all include users or matching reports may become misleading.
Prefer HSD_ASSERT(line, expr) when it captures the same filename/line/expression behavior as manual __assert calls; it improves readability and reduces duplicate string literals.
Field renames are safe matching cleanups when offsets are unchanged; choose names derived from observed API roles, such as static vs dynamic HSD_Text windows.
Small declaration-order changes and empty conditionals may be legitimate matching tactics when isolated and evidence-backed by permuter results, but they should be kept local and searchable.
Decomp.dev match reports after renames may appear as many new matches and many broken matches because the unit name changed; interpret the net code-size delta and renamed unit path together.
naming_conventions: Pokemon Stadium ground module path uses grpstadium.c/grpstadium.h, while exported/decompiled functions in this slice still use the grStadium_* prefix.
Temporary user-data variables representing the TextWrapper were sometimes renamed to gp2 in local display routines.
Assert cleanup expresses checks as HSD_ASSERT(line_hex, expression) rather than __assert("grpstadium.c", line, "expression").
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used the physical source rename to make __FILE__/HSD_ASSERT produce grpstadium.c instead of hardcoding the filename in every assert.
Converted manual null-check-and-__assert sequences to HSD_ASSERT while preserving original line constants such as 0x6D2, 0x6D3, 0x780, 0x781, 0x812, and 0x813.
In grStadium_801D3138, moved HSD_DObj* dobj below HSD_JObj* jobj and added an empty if ((jobj->flags && jobj->flags)) block before the mobj null check, likely to influence generated assembly.
The bot reported grStadium_801D3138 improved from 98.43% in the old grstadium unit to a 100% match under grpstadium, consistent with the title's permuter-match claim.

Renaming the unit generated decomp.dev accounting churn: 74 new matches under main/melee/gr/grpstadium and 73 broken matches under main/melee/gr/grstadium, plus unmatched-item improvements/regressions mirrored by the unit rename.
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the slice.
The only issue comment was a decomp-dev bot report for GALE01 showing matched code 55.56% with +0.01% and +408 bytes.

Bot report highlighted new matches including grStadium_801D2528, grStadium_801D3460, grStadium_801D1EF8, grStadium_801D1B48, grStadium_801D2344, grStadium_801D3138, grStadium_801D2BEC, fn_801D2ED0, and others under main/melee/gr/grpstadium.
follow_up_queries: Look for later PRs that rename grStadium_* symbols or further clean grpstadium.c naming after the file rename.
Search for other files with TODOs saying the filename is wrong for asserts and apply the same source-file rename plus split/config update pattern.
Review other manual __assert("file.c", line, "expr") blocks that can safely become HSD_ASSERT after filename alignment.
Investigate grStadium_801D4548, grStadium_801D3BBC, grStadium_801D435C, grStadium_801D2A60, fn_801D2FD0, and fn_801D3084, which the bot still reported as partial matches under grpstadium.
Search for x18/x1C HSD_Text wrapper fields in related stage display code that may benefit from win_static_p/win_dynamic_p-style names.
